title: Sulfur Backport
description: This mod backports the blocks from the Chaos Cubed update.
body:
Sulfur Backport.
=================

This mod ports the Sulfur and Cinnabar blocks from Minecraft's new Chaos Cubed update to earlier versions!!!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Here's a video showcasing all the blocks this mod backports.

https://youtu.be/lmVlB8KBtlQ

As of the Initial Release, the Chaos Cubed update has not actually release, So there aren't recipes or worldgen.

These will be added as soon as the first snapshot with the blocks releases.
